test_cases.failure_message:
Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist
Expected
    <int>: 2
to equal
    <int>: 3
test_cases.failure_body:
[FAILED] Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist
Expected
    <int>: 2
to equal
    <int>: 3
In [It] at: /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/sigs.k8s.io/cluster-api/test@v1.13.2/framework/controlplane_helpers.go:115 @ 06/03/26 15:36:07.1

ai_summary.summary: Test failed due to incorrect control plane machine count configuration, leading to timeout during HA cluster initialization.

ai_analysis.root_cause: Build-log.txt line 1507 shows the cluster was created with `--control-plane-machine-count 1` instead of the required 3 for HA. AzureMachine resources for the control plane were never created (cloud-init-output.log 404 error). The test configuration mismatched the expected HA setup.
ai_analysis.suggested_fix: Update the test's cluster creation command to use `--control-plane-machine-count 3` in the test configuration. The error originates from the test code in `sigs.k8s.io/cluster-api-provider-azure/test/e2e/e2e_suite_test.go` where the control plane count is incorrectly set to 1.
